summary: Issue #471 P2-9-9 coverage reporter: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. generate_coverage_report computes revenue/live/revenue_live/product buckets with exact-fraction gates (≥95% revenue+live, ≥90% product), exit_ready boolean, missing_dates merged with AnalyticsBackfillPartitionsRepo incomplete rows (#464), JSON/markdown serializers, CLI coverage subcommand (exit 0 when exit_ready). 9/9 unit tests pass on synthetic DB; no Partner HTTP.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: BudgetExhaustedError dropped from __all__ when coverage exports added; symbol still importable.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Restore to __all__ in a follow-up hygiene pass if star-import consumers exist.

criticalFindings.description: Catalog bucket reports days_present=0 as informational stub; catalog_mode inferred from grains. Matches PRD deferral of catalog exit gate.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Extend catalog coverage when slice defines catalog exit criteria.

mappings.criterion: Pytest synthetic DB coverage_pct and exit_ready match thresholds
Pytest 949 revenue live exit_ready false 950 true exact fraction
Pytest product at 90 percent passes product gate independently
Missing dates align with incomplete partitions from 464
No live Partner in CI synthetic DB only
